snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Full production UI integration and honest unavailable-state review
reviewers.independence: UI Design accepted the exact frozen Development hash. Product Planning independently reproduced its 17-path patch/content identities, empty index and diff-check, then reviewed the UI owner, runtime dependency, exact selectors, service boundaries and status-preserving open work without changing Development bytes.

dimensions.summary: The existing owners locate the approved complete-UI baseline, mechanical React migration, responsive shell, Settings ownership, icon dependency and serial UI workflow without adding a document.

Owners agree on primary navigation, Library/Reader panes, Settings and maintenance ownership, exact responsive widths, Lucide isolation, and the distinction between real, partial and unavailable surfaces.
Four exact UI selectors project current executable evidence while semantic lock v3 has 1,211 claims; Requirement counts remain 19 verified, 62 partial and 21 planned, and Exit counts remain 14/64/22.

Development gets one serial UI chain, a sole approved visual baseline, typed connection points, unavailable-state rules and exact pane/dependency contracts; corrections remain baseline-led incremental candidates.
No Markdown file or decision is added; existing owners are compressed while the visual and dependency contracts remain machine-checkable within all fixed budgets.

verification.evidence: The exact frozen candidate plus current recipe passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate test, package, distribution and assembled UI evidence
verification.evidence: Focused 5/97, independent UI 5/89 and full 112 files plus one skipped with 1,270 tests plus one skipped pass; typecheck, build, audit, macOS package, packaged and downloaded-distribution smokes pass. Real Electron proves responsive Home/Library/Reader/Settings, six locales, exact focus restoration and honest unavailable activation with zero Job change.

verification.command: npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The candidate has 58 dependency records and zero waivers, including exact lucide-react@1.17.0 with lock integrity/license boundaries; semantic lock v3/1,211 and CON-001 through CON-004 pass with no Requirement or Exit status change.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 56 Markdown files, 3,466 entry words, 3,629 trace lines, 249,999 trace bytes and 1,213,000 or fewer governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.compatibility: The candidate mechanically migrates the approved UI into the renderer and adds one renderer-only icon dependency; it adds no IPC, durable schema, provider, permission, Backup/Restore or backend capability. Unavailable entries are visual shell only.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact 5540e025/bd8fbf85 bytes after consuming the accepted UI Design contract. Planning synchronized existing owners, dependency, visual contract, status-preserving acceptance, semantic lock and this recipe without changing Development bytes.

nonBlockingRisks: Real Windows x64 packageability and packaged visual evidence remain mandatory at the next PM online checkpoint.

Appearance, capabilities, memory, reusable permission policy, Skills, packages, updates, Note Agent and unbound Reader/Knowledge actions remain unavailable visual entries rather than implemented capabilities.
Future visual corrections must update or faithfully consume the approved baseline; current acceptance does not claim pixel-perfect, signed-installed or full assistive-technology closure.
